title: rubus × leucanthemimorphus
intro: Rubus × leucanthemimorphus, also known as the hybrid raspberry, is a cross between the Rubus idaeus and the Rubus fruticosus. It is a type of bramble that has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits. The medicinal properties of Rubus × leucanthemimorphus include its high antioxidant content and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to reduce the risk of certain diseases. The health benefits of this plant include reducing oxidative stress, improving cardiovascular health, and providing relief from pain and inflammation, and it can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions.
